title: Night Vision Toggle
description: A simple plugin that allows any player to turn on or off night vision for themselves.
body:
# **Night Vision Toggle**

**A simple quality-of-life plugin that gives all players personal control over their brightness with a toggleable Night Vision command.**

---

## **⭐ Core Features**

*   **Personal Night Vision:** Each player can toggle night vision for themselves without affecting anyone else on the server.
*   **Zero Configuration:** No commands or setup are needed for admins.
*   **Extremely Lightweight:** Designed to be highly efficient with no impact on server performance.
*   **Simple and Intuitive:** Easy on/off commands make it accessible for all players.

---

## **⌨️ Commands & Permissions**

The main command is **/nightvision**.

*   **/nightvision on**
    *   Grants the player permanent Night Vision until it is turned off.

*   **/nightvision off**
    *   Removes the Night Vision effect from the player.

*   **Permission:**
    *   **Default:** Granted to all players.

---

## **💡 Suggestions & Feedback**

**Want to request changes or need support? Join my Discord and share your ideas!**

🔗 https://discord.gg/kGfcXWG7mx
